description: Create lookup tables mapping instrument type ID to its parameter definitions. ~35 categories: Ac.Piano (lid, damper noise, string reso, key off reso), E.Piano (tremolo, amp sim), TW Organ (9 harmonic bars + 4 perc params), Ac.Guitar (body, string, picking), E.Guitar (pickup, amp), Brass (mute, growl), Wind (noise, growl, embouchure), Sax (growl, sub tone, noise), etc. Each category has 2-22 params. Source from docs/params/02-supernatural-acoustic.md.
title: Core: SN-A instrument parameter tables
